description: Users need a notification center where they can see unread badges, open a notification list, mark notifications read or unread, filter by read state, and clear all read notifications. Store read state so it persists across sessions.

userStories.title: Add schema for notification read state
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a schema to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Database schema includes read state for notifications
Default is unread
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add backend actions for read state updates
userStories.description: As a developer, I want backend actions to mark notifications as read, unread, and clear all read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend action to mark notification as read
Backend action to mark notification as unread
Backend action to clear all read notifications
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add notification unread badge UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a badge indicating unread notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Badge shows number of unread notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add notification list UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list to see my notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification list UI displays notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add read/unread toggle controls in notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications as read or unread from the list.
acceptanceCriteria: UI controls to toggle read/unread state
Action updates backend and UI
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add filter for read state in notification list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter my notifications by read state.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter UI allows selecting read or unread
List updates to show matching notifications
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add clear all read notifications button
userStories.description: As a user, I want a button to clear all my read notifications.
acceptanceCriteria: Button to clear read notifications is visible
Clicking triggers the backend clear action and updates list
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
